name: Source Fidelity review for Ssr Assessment Stakes Boundaries bundle
summary: Accepted after metadata cleanup. The contextual guidance sources point to official or primary pages, direct synthetic-response support comes from previously verified full-text records, source locators are present, and access-limited candidates are screened without being used as direct support.
corrections_applied: Renamed the ETS source and screening decision from a loose working title to the PDF title, Responsible Use of AI in Assessment.
Reworded the TEAL/LINCS source and finding as practice guidance rather than official policy guidance.

findings.claim_or_issue: The testing standards, ETS AI guidance, and TEAL/LINCS formative-assessment page are contextual guidance rather than direct synthetic-response studies.
findings.why_it_matters: The claim should not imply these sources empirically validate synthetic responses.
findings.recommended_action: Keep these sources labeled as boundary conditions and retain the direct-support distinction in supporting_evidence.
